mapper.sql: select team_level_id, team_level, team_level_name, required_user_level, required_direct_users, required_team_users, required_team_invest, reward_amount, team_bonus_rate, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_team_level
mapper.insert: insert into sys_team_level(team_level, team_level_name, required_user_level, required_direct_users, required_team_users, required_team_invest, reward_amount, team_bonus_rate, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{teamLevel}, #{teamLevelName}, #{requiredUserLevel}, #{requiredDirectUsers}, #{requiredTeamUsers}, #{requiredTeamInvest}, #{rewardAmount}, #{teamBonusRate}, #{status}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_team_level where team_level_id in
#{teamLevelId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user u where u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0' and cast(substring_index(ifnull(u.level_detail, '0'), ',', -1) as signed) = #{userId}
select count(1) from sys_user u where u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0' and u.user_id != #{userId} and find_in_set(cast(#{userId} as char), ifnull(u.level_detail, '')) > 0

select ifnull(sum(o.principal_amount), 0) from sys_yebao_order o where o.user_id in ( select u.user_id from sys_user u where u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id != #{userId} and find_in_set(cast(#{userId} as char), ifnull(u.level_detail, '')) > 0 ) and o.status in ('HOLDING', 'REDEEMED')
mapper.update: update sys_user set team_leader_level = #{teamLeaderLevel}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
